name: HRC_MESSAGE_DELIVERY
description: Table to track the messages delivery

columns.Name: MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier for the message which is being sent out to through different media.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This field indicates whether response is required for the specific message delivery or not.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_STATUS
columns.Comments: The response status which is sent as part of user response. Will have values like ACKNOWLEDGED APPROVED REJECT

columns.Name: COMMUNICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier of the communication table row related to which this individual message is.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the message delivery. This field indicates whether a message is sucessfully delivered or not.

columns.Name: COMMUNICATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of the communication through which the message is being sent.

columns.Name: COMMUNICATION_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Communication Address phone number, device id etc

columns.Name: USER_GUID
columns.Comments: GUID of the user to whom the message is intented to.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_TRACKER_ID
columns.Comments: The tracker identification key which is obtained while sending the email.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The field indicates the type of the message delivery.

columns.Name: RULE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the rule node for which message is sent.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The field indicates whether the recipient is of cc or bcc or to type.

columns.Name: GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The field indicate the identifier used of grouping the data.
